## [00:00 - 01:32]

This is a podcast shot. I'm John Loomer and today we're going to talk about the problem with relying on conversion rate. Let's go. One of the biggest mistakes Facebook advertisers make is related to conversion rate. Is this you? So you're looking at your Google Analytics related to a product landing page. You realize you have a 10% conversion rate. Suddenly the light bulb goes off. Hmm so if I send a hundred people to this page I'll get 10 sales. If I send a thousand people to this page I'll get 100 sales. If I send a million people so now you're feeling super smart so you run those ads with the focus of driving the most traffic at the lowest cost possible. You optimize for link clicks or landing page views but then you realize you're not getting those conversions. This might be when you figure out not all clicks are created equal. If you optimize for link clicks or landing page views you're going to get low quality traffic. This is not how you scale. If you want sales don't try to outsmart the algorithm. Optimize for a conversion. Hope that helps. Follow for more. So this shot was taken directly from a video I did on TikTok. If you're not already following me on TikTok do so at John Loomer. You can also keep following me here. Don't forget to subscribe, rate and review. Until next time, do awesome things. I'm out.
